rule: Only source-gated cards may claim real-data backing. Missing provenance downgrades the card to educational proxy.

sources.BacDive: standardized bacterial/archaeal strain metadata: morphology, physiology, environment, taxonomy
sources.BsubCyc: Bacillus subtilis regulation, metabolism and network context
sources.CDC Acanthamoeba: free-living one-celled ameba habitat and public-health context
sources.CDC_Acanthamoeba: official habitat/public-health framing for Acanthamoeba; not a simulation calibration source
sources.CLSI: laboratory standards and method/quality framework for future AST provenance
sources.ChEMBL: curated bioactive molecule and drug-like activity records for future drug-response cards
sources.EUCAST: breakpoints, MIC/zone distributions and AST interpretation structures for future antibiotic cards
sources.EcoCyc: E. coli genes, metabolism, regulation, omics, media and strain database context
sources.RCSB_PDB: macromolecular structure records for future antibody/antigen binding cards
sources.SGD: Saccharomyces cerevisiae genes, phenotypes, pathways, expression and interaction resources
